title.en: Rabbi Yochanan Ben Zakkai: The Man Who Saved Judaism After the Temple
title.zh: 拉比约哈南·本·扎卡伊：拯救圣殿之后犹太教的人
title.he: רבן יוחנן בן זכאי: האיש שהציל את היהדות אחרי החורבן

description.en: How one rabbi smuggled himself out of besieged Jerusalem in a coffin and founded the academy at Yavneh, ensuring Judaism's survival after the Temple's destruction.
description.zh: 一位拉比如何将自己藏在棺材里从被围困的耶路撒冷偷运出来，并在雅夫内建立了学院，确保了圣殿被毁后犹太教的存续。
description.he: כיצד רב אחד הבריח את עצמו מירושלים הנצורה בארון מתים וייסד את ישיבת יבנה, מה ש הבטיח את הישרדות היהדות לאחר חורבן הבית

sources.title: Gittin 56a-b: Rabbi Yochanan ben Zakkai and Vespasian
Yavneh: The Crucible of Rabbinic Judaism
The Destruction of the Second Temple
Pirkei Avot 2:8: The Five Students of Rabbi Yochanan ben Zakkai

main_figures.role: Central figure who escaped Jerusalem and founded the academy at Yavneh
Roman general who became emperor; granted Yochanan's request for Yavneh
Yochanan's nephew and leader of the zealots who helped with the escape

chinese: Scholars preserving texts during book burning
Transmission of wisdom through teacher-student chains
universal: Resilience in the face of destruction
